info.name: Kiwi General Insurance – Strapi API
info.description:
Full API collection for Kiwi General Insurance Strapi v5 backend.
Base URL: http://localhost:1337/api

All filter/sort/pagination params are visible in the Params tab.
Disabled params (unchecked) show available options — enable them as needed.

Strapi v5 filter operators: $eq, $ne, $lt, $lte, $gt, $gte, $in, $notIn, $contains, $containsi, $null, $notNull, $startsWith, $endsWith

query.description: Populate all relations. Options: *, seo, stats, promoCards, insuranceProducts, blocks

true = external links only, false = internal links only
